Counting Calories vs Tracking Macros (Australia)

Calories drive weight change; macros drive body composition. Beginners do fine counting calories; people training seriously should track both.

Feature Comparison Table

Feature Counting Calories Tracking Macros
Tracks energy? Yes Yes
Tracks protein? No Yes
Effort Low Medium
Protects muscle? Not directly Yes (via protein target)
Best for Beginners Lifters & athletes

Comparison Verdict

Start with calories. Once you're consistent, add a protein target. If you train hard, track all three macros.
